summary: First-run end-to-end testing of Perk Orbit (FastAPI + Vite React PWA). All 12 backend pytest tests PASS including GPT-4o SMS extraction and real-image OCR. Frontend critical flows PASS: PIN set+confirm, bottom nav (home/coupons/points), smart search croma->Tata, manual voucher add appears in My Coupons, SMS paste extract pre-fills brand=Swiggy & code=SWIGGY150, profile menu (Profile/Membership/Circle/Settings/Lock), profile save, mocked Razorpay activation w/ referral code, how-to-redeem in-app sheet, lock app returns to PIN.

ui_bugs.issue: Sheets do not close on Escape key, and the close button structure inside Sheet has no data-testid making backdrop-only dismissal possible. Minor UX nit.

issues: Back chevron uses lucide ChevronLeft icon (not ArrowLeft as my selector guessed) – purely test-side; ensure a data-testid like 'topbar-back' would help automation.

action_items: Optional: add data-testid='topbar-back' on the TopBar back button for robust automation.
Optional: support Escape key to close <Sheet> for keyboard / accessibility parity.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: _serialize mutates the doc and is fine, but consider explicitly excluding `_id` if any new code path returns docs directly without _serialize.
App.jsx is ~970 lines combining many screens/sheets — consider splitting screens/* into their own files for maintainability (>700 line guideline).
Membership.activate uses query param user_pin instead of body; OK for mock, but for real Razorpay flow this should be POST body + signed payload.
extract_image relies on PIL re-encoding; this is good. No try/except around llm.send_message itself — a transient LLM failure surfaces as 502 already (OK).

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all required flows verified; only minor topbar-back selector + escape-key dismiss not tested)

test_credentials: App PIN: 1234 (set on first launch). user_pin query param for backend: 1234.
seed_data_creation: Tests create and clean up TEST_-prefixed vouchers and circle members under user_pin=1234. A mocked Pro membership is left active for user_pin=1234 (mock Razorpay).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_perk_orbit.py — run with `pytest backend/tests/test_perk_orbit.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. They cover all endpoints listed in the review request including LLM-backed /api/extract/sms and /api/extract/image (a generated PIL JPEG with visible text is used for OCR). Frontend Sheet does not close on Escape — use the X close button (no data-testid yet) or click backdrop. lucide back-arrow icon in TopBar uses ChevronLeft (not ArrowLeft). PIN is persisted in localStorage; second runs land on verify mode (single 1234 entry).
